name: IRC_EMP_EVENT_MESSAGES
description: This table stores the details of the employee event messages

columns.Name: MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: ACTION_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Stores ACTION_TRACKING_ID. Foreign key to irc_emp_event_action_trk table.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores action types supported values are ORA_MSG and ORA_NOTIFICATION.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores RECIPIENT_PERSON_ID. Foreign Key to per_persons table.

columns.Name: ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Stores recipient (Email) Address of the recipient.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DIRECTION
columns.Comments: Stores the message direction values are ORA_INBOUND and ORA_OUTBOUND.

columns.Name: SUBJECT
columns.Comments: Stores subject part for the message.

columns.Name: BODY
columns.Comments: Stores body part for the message.

columns.Name: MSG_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Stores Unified Message Service (UMS) message Id.

columns.Name: MSG_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the message status as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_CMT_MSG_STATUS_TYPE.

columns.Name: MSG_SENT_TS
columns.Comments: Stores message sent time  for this message.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Stores the reason for error status of the execution.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ESS Job Request ID of the current recipient row.

columns.Name: MSG_RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: stores current message retry count.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
